webSearch.apiKey.label: OpenAI-Compatible Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: DashScope or another OpenAI-compatible web search API key.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: OpenAI-compatible chat completions base URL override.

webSearch.model.label: Model
webSearch.model.help: Model override for the search-capable chat completions API.

webSearch.toolName.label: Display Name
webSearch.toolName.help: Human-friendly name shown in tool descriptions and errors.

webSearch.enableSearch.label: Enable Search
webSearch.enableSearch.help: Send the provider's built-in web-search trigger parameter.

webSearch.enableThinking.label: Enable Thinking
webSearch.enableThinking.help: Enable provider-specific reasoning mode when supported.

webSearch.searchParam.label: Search Parameter
webSearch.searchParam.help: Request body field used to trigger provider-side web search.
